evidence.claim: Items can have their urgency level set or changed as needed.
evidence.fact: The system can remove the patient with the highest urgency and earliest arrival from the queue.
evidence.user_story_span: Items can have their urgency level set or changed as needed.

evidence.claim: The urgency level uses a numeric scale from 1 to 5, with 1 being lowest and 5 highest.
evidence.fact: The waiting list is organized using descending severity and ascending check-in timestamp.
